creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
I have since rebooted my PC. On #freebsd I had some advice for better info, next time I get this crash. (It may be redundant at this point, but if it crops up again I'll provide it:)


- disassemble kern_kevent, find the instruction at +1025 offset
- addr2line -e /boot/kernel/kernel <addr>

If there's anything else I can pull that'd be helpful, let me know.
